name: imagebind
description: A model for text, audio, and image embeddings in one space

input.description: file that you want to embed. Needs to be text, vision, or audio.
input.title: Input

modality.description: modality of the input you'd like to embed
modality.title: modality

text_input.description: text that you want to embed. Provide a string here instead of a text file to input if you'd like.
text_input.title: Text Input
